D1 Optics L2 Understand Atom

Snell's Window

dive underwater and watch the entire sky compress into a 97° cone overhead

From below the water surface, every above-water ray bends into a cone of half-angle θ_c. The whole hemisphere of sky compresses into a circular window of about 97°.

Slide the water index. The pale window widens as n approaches 1; outside the window the underwater world becomes a mirror of the lake bottom.
